title: antiphylla biflora
intro: Antiphylla biflora, also known as the two-flowered antiphylla, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to induce sweating, making it useful in treating colds and fevers. It is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and relieving digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties. Antiphylla biflora can be prepared as a tincture or infusion for medicinal use, although its availability and usage may vary due to limited research and availability of the plant.
